positive: A delicate, continuous line drawing illustration of various wildflowers and herbs, arranged in a wreath pattern. The style is minimalist botanical etching, rendered in deep forest green and soft cream ink, suitable for a journal or poster. Highly detailed, clean vector art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, sketch, pencil lines
